articles.headline: Barcelona pounce on Madrid slip with Yamal brilliance
articles.description: Barcelona defeated Espanyol 4-1. Lamine Yamal was instrumental, providing assists and scoring a goal. This victory extended Barcelona's lead in La Liga. The team now focuses on their Champions League match. Ferran Torres ended a scoring drought with two goals…

articles.headline: Sparks trade Rickea Jackson to Sky for Ariel Atkins in WNBA free agency splash
articles.description: The Los Angeles Sparks traded Rickea Jackson to the Chicago Sky for Ariel Atkins in a WNBA free agency player swap.

articles.headline: Penalty flag takes ride on SkyCam during Columbus-Dallas UFL game
articles.description: Penalty flags continuned to make news in the third week of the United Football League season.

articles.headline: Show HN: Revdiff – TUI diff reviewer with inline annotations for AI agents
articles.description: I built a terminal diff viewer for a workflow I couldn't do comfortably with existing tools: reviewing AI-generated code changes without leaving the terminal session where the agent runs, annotating what needs to change, and feeding those annotations straight…
